case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. GORDON CHESTER CHIN

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,833.76 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT CHIN, GORDON CHESTER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-24-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHIN, GORDON CHESTER $1,888.22 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,038.22 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
D.M.V. CERTIFICATE OF FACTS RE UNSATISFIED JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT CHIN, GORDON CHESTER

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-24-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-24-2018 BY PRO TEM JEAN MILLEF. 506. PLAINTIFF IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY RYON HOWARD, CLAIMS INVESTIGATOR. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILLEF. CLERK: G. FELICIANO. NOT REPORTED. (506)
